generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how overblown civil defense programs drain resources from real national security. We need to focus on proven deterrence strategies, not waste money on feel-good preparedness gimmicks that make politicians look good but do nothing to actually protect us. Our allies should step up their burden-sharing before we divert funds to domestic programs that won't make a difference in a real crisis. #NationalSecurityFirst
